docs.text: About Me Hello, I’m Eric Nemchik. I’m a techie who loves to code in all sorts of computer languages. Thanks for visiting. What I'm up to 🔭 I’m currently working on Expanding my knowledge and experience with the skills and hobbies I love! 🌱 I’m currently learning 👯 I’m looking to collaborate on Automating everything! 🤔 I’m looking for help with Sleep.
